name: Devbox
description: Installs Devbox by Jetify — a Nix-based tool for creating isolated, reproducible development environments. Optionally runs 'devbox install' to set up packages defined in devbox.json.

version.description: Version of Devbox to install. Use 'latest' for the most recent release.

runInstall.description: If true, run 'devbox install' after installing Devbox to install packages from the workspace devbox.json.
